title: Only if You Knew
summary: So. It’s been a while. And with that comes probably my last piece of writing for... well, a while. A lot has happened in my life this year which has changed me as a person and one of the results of that means I’m not into k-pop as much as I was before. It has honestly been such a journey; I’ve made new friendships, met new people, listened to amazing groups and discovered amazing music but it just doesn’t have the same appeal it once did. Perhaps it’s just a bad year and that’s tainted all my hobbies and interests I used to love or maybe it’s just life - who knows! But one thing still close to my heart is writing and I don’t think I’ll ever stop scribbling words down in the hopes of making them sound nice but I think my time with fan fiction has ended! I wanted to write a final piece for my collection, a little way of saying goodbye. I never like to say never (ha!), I always like to keep my doors open so there’s a chance I may come back, who knows what could happen. But I have to pen the end of this chapter. I’m grateful to every single person who has ever read any work of mine, given feedback, messaged or commented on my works. You all gave me the motivation, desire and energy to write more and provide more content. To anyone reading this, I wish you the absolute best and I love you! I’ll still be around to answer any questions and I’ll do my best to reply to any comments! Peace out, hotties! 💋 (Please note: I haven’t written in a while so I’m a bit rusty and I’ve only proof read it a couple of times so apologies for any typos!)

title: Pushing Daisies
summary: Park Jimin possesses a rare gift, the ability to restore life to the dead with a single touch. When Jimin hears of your sudden death, a  spur of the moment decision brings him back to his home town , intent on using his gift to bring you back to give you second chance at life. There’s just one little problem… Jimin soon starts falling for you. But the problem is, if Jimin ever touches you again, you’ll die, this time for good. Jimin starts to think his gift just might be his curse, having you back in his life, but unable to hold you, even touch you, is life’s biggest joke on him yet.
